steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with the given equation.
$$R=\frac{0.37l}{A}$$
Multiply both sides by $A$ to remove the denominator.
$$AR=0.37l$$

steps.title: Isolate the length
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $0.37$.
$$\frac{AR}{0.37}=l$$
So
$$l=\frac{AR}{0.37}$$
The answer is D.
